extName.message: X (Twitter) OFF: Daily Time Limit for X
extName.description: Name of the extension shown in the Chrome Web Store and toolbar tooltip.

extDescription.message: Set a daily time limit on X. Active viewing is measured; scrolling is blocked when the cap is reached. You can lift it yourself.

optionsDescription.message: When you have spent this many minutes actively viewing X, scrolling will be blocked. Elapsed time accumulates as a daily total and resets automatically when the date changes.

optionsHelpRange.message: Pick a value from 1 to 600 minutes.

optionsSavedMessage.message: Saved. You can close this tab.

optionsValidationError.message: Please enter a number between 1 and 600.

popupNoLimitSet.message: No limit set yet — open the settings page to configure.

popupSupportNote.message: Tip if you find this useful

overlayMessage.message: You have reached the time limit you set for yourself.

overlayHint.message: You're done for today. The timer resets when the date changes.

shareTextWithLimit.message:
X today: $MINUTES$ min (cap $LIMIT$ min)
Choosing how I spend my time on X.
#X_OFF
Using X OFF, a Chrome extension that caps your time on X.
$LINK$

Choosing how I spend my time on X.
